title: ABOUT US
body: As an overseas aid worker and independent missionary, Gary Britton taught his children the rewards of serving others. Gary has long since retired, and his daughters now head up Sponsors of Hope. Their daily messages of hope touch the lives of people the world over.
Sponsors of Hope is not affiliated with any church, denomination or test test religious organization.
We are just a small family, doing what we can to make a difference by inspiring more harmony, peace and compassion between us all.
1. "WHERE ARE THE TWINS FROM?"          Sally and Silvie were born in Costa Rica and were raised in Costa Rica, France, Brazil and later lived for a while in the U.S.
2. "HOW MANY LANGUAGES DO THE TWINS SPEAK?"          The girls speak Spanish, English, French, & Portuguese.
3. "ARE THE TWINS MISSIONARIES?"          Yes. No. Maybe... kind of. But not in the traditional sense. Think of them as modern "internet missionaries".
4. "WHEN WAS SPONSORS OF HOPE FOUNDED?"          SOH was founded in 2004.
5. "DO THE TWINS BELONG TO ANY CHURCH?"          No, the twins do not belong to any church or denomination. Sponsors of Hope is separate and independent.
6. "WHERE DO YOUR DEVOTIONAL WRITINGS COME FROM?"          We write our own material.
7. "DO YOU HAVE ANY BOOKS AVAILABLE FOR PURCHASE?"          Yes. You can see the books we have available on the "Our Links" tab.

8. "I AM HAVING TROUBLE WITH MY SPOUSE (kids, job, neighbors etc). CAN YOU HELP?"          We do not offer individual counseling and advice. Nor can we accept personal chats, phone calls or video calls.
9. "WHERE DO YOU FILM THE VIDEOS?"          We produce our video PSAs in different places. Wherever we happen to be.
10. "WHERE CAN I SEE YOUR VIDEOS ON TELEVISION?"          Please ask your local TV station to contact us if they are not already airing them in your area.

11. "WHAT DO YOU THINK ABOUT BAPTISM? (ABORTION? GAYS? ETC?)"          We do not waste our time arguing religious doctrine. We believe Christians should stop telling people what God wants them to do. Only God knows our hearts and Christians need to stop sticking their noses in everyone else's business.

12. "I NOTICED THAT YOU NEVER WEIGH IN ON POLITICAL ISSUES."          Correct. We believe that Christians who get involved in politics are misguided. The Bible says we should "be subject to those that rule over us", and that we should pray for them! -- not fight against them, but rather be examples of Christ's love!
13. "CAN I SEND THE REFLECTIONS TO MY FRIENDS?"          Yes, please do. You can share the readings with anyone, anywhere!
14. "I NOTICE YOU RARELY ASK FOR DONATIONS. WHY IS THAT?"          We prefer that people give voluntarily as the Lord leads them, motivated by love.
15. "DO YOU REALLY THINK THERE WILL BE A HAPPY ENDING?"          Yes! We TRULY believe that LOVE will reign in the end!
